description_long: This object is a classic, compact camera with a predominantly black body and silver or gray accents. The front features a large, circular lens with a textured focus ring, a small lever, and a button, all set into a rectangular housing. The top of the camera includes a prominent shutter button, a winding knob, and a viewfinder window, all rendered in a lighter color. The back is smooth and unadorned, with the winding knob and viewfinder visible from above. The sides are rounded, and the overall design is reminiscent of vintage rangefinder cameras, with a robust, utilitarian build. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with glass for the lens and viewfinder.
description: A vintage-style compact camera with a black body, silver accents, and a prominent circular lens. Features include a textured focus ring, winding knob, and viewfinder.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large lens, focus ring, shutter button, and a small lever on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded edge, winding knob, and the top-mounted controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back, winding knob, and the viewfinder window on top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the lens protrusion, rounded edge, and the top controls.
